purpose: Freeze one deterministic, result-neutral implementation-conformance fixture for the accepted B-R lifecycle, encounter, restoration, control-addressability, and quarantine interfaces before any conformance runtime operation.

bound_rcae_artifacts.role: admitted public source, callable, test, and producer-extension boundary
bounded N31 return and B-R provider-contract admission
Q-013 contrast and Q-015 restoration design

environment.pygrc_import_rule: PYTHONPATH must resolve from ${RCAE_PYGRC_ROOT}/src and the imported package must be inside that exact source tree

bound_graph_sources.role: LGRC9V3 base node and state construction
native packet scheduling and conservative transition implementation
LGRC9V3 construction, event progression, packet operations, and persistence
public geometric, functional, and causal distance addressability

required_public_calls.allowed_use: construct the frozen synthetic role topology only
construct the base state consumed by LGRC9V3
construct only the LGRC9V3 core substrate
read registered carrier coherence, packet/event state, and retained conformance projections
formation, B-R export, matched-mass control, and fixed encounter requests
process one frozen packet event and expose native refusal
drain only the already bounded fixture queue
construct exact composite state and reconstruction evidence
load only after composite manifest validation
paired native-plus-RCAE reset to the frozen baseline
retain the exact native current-plus-reset identity
bind native components inside exact composite identities
prove the admitted geometric-distance interface is callable without interpreting a scientific result
prove the admitted functional-distance interface is callable without interpreting a scientific result
prove the admitted causal-distance interface is callable without interpreting a scientific result

blocked_public_calls.reason: synchronous GRC9V3 execution cannot substitute for LGRC9V3
synchronous GRC9V3 relaxation cannot substitute for LGRC9V3
direct native state installation would bypass the frozen packet and composite-restoration interfaces
the conformance reset baseline is immutable after construction

inputs: current coherence of the one frozen carrier binding
frozen source, destination, edge, route, and policy identities
outputs: typed invalid, duplicate, eligible-zero, or eligible-positive transition
at most one exact native packet request
updated serializable policy state and audit receipt

inputs: branch-local structural source, target, and edge bindings
outputs: one exact native packet request or a structural validation refusal

composite_restoration.load_rule: validate the complete manifest and every component before returning a runnable branch
composite_restoration.reset_rule: restore paired native and RCAE baselines without implicit rebase

quarantine_guard.role: reject any conformance path, digest, fixture value, or observation imported into later calibration, registration-value, candidate, control-result, or scientific-result records

fixture.fixture_value_rationale: Two equal formation requests make the repetition interface visible; one capped export moves the carrier to the fixture floor; the fixed probe is admitted before and refused after that export. This deliberate branch split tests operation and refusal wiring only and is prohibited from becoming a metric, threshold, topology, candidate expectation, or scientific result.
event_order: two attributable formation departures and arrivals settle independently
formation stops and the exact composite checkpoint is retained
one exact lifecycle receipt is validated against its predecessor
eligible-positive policy transition reserves one export request
native carrier debit, transport, and reservoir credit settle
a second eligible receipt advances as eligible-zero without native mutation
independent clean branches schedule one fixed local encounter each
native LGRC9V3 admits or refuses without a route selector

conformance_matrix.name: runtime_and_operation_binding
requirements: all required public symbols resolve callable from the exact graph source tree
all blocked calls remain unused
LGRC9V3 is the only executing substrate

conformance_matrix.name: repeated_native_formation_and_persistence
requirements: two distinct native formation transfers settle with exact lineage
each source debit equals packet amount equals carrier credit
the queue is empty at the later persistent checkpoint

conformance_matrix.name: positive_export_and_conservative_settlement
requirements: one exact eligible receipt produces one policy transition and one native request
carrier debit equals in-flight amount equals reservoir credit
global node-plus-packet coherence closes
the settled carrier does not cross the fixture export floor

conformance_matrix.name: eligible_zero_invalid_and_duplicate_lifecycle
requirements: eligible-zero consumes its receipt and advances only policy state
invalid receipt consumes nothing and preserves exact composite identity
duplicate consumed receipt refuses atomically and preserves exact composite identity
no second export may be pending before settlement

conformance_matrix.name: fixed_local_native_encounter
requirements: the blind adapter constructs the same role-matched request without carrier or other-route reads
one clean fixture branch is natively admitted
one clean fixture branch is natively refused for insufficient source coherence
refusal is exact-state neutral relative to the pre-step identity that already contains the scheduled request

conformance_matrix.name: q013_contrast_addressability
requirements: formation-quantity match has separate repeated and one-pulse constructors
export-mass match has separate candidate and conserved equal-source/carrier debit constructors
complete-state/history match can retain different audit histories with equal causal projections without treating equality as scientific continuation evidence

conformance_matrix.name: composite_save_load_reset_fork_and_replay
requirements: original and loaded exact composites match
paired native-plus-policy reset returns to the frozen baseline without rebase
two forks start from one validated clean parent with distinct branch identities
equal input replay reproduces native events, lifecycle receipts, disposition, and causal projections over the bounded conformance horizon

conformance_matrix.name: partial_stale_and_cross_bound_load_refusal
requirements: missing component and digest tamper refuse before a runnable model is returned
wrong route, policy, opportunity, branch, or reset identity refuses before continuation
native-only or policy-only load is never exposed as a valid composite

conformance_matrix.name: control_and_variation_interface_addressability
requirements: relocation, role-preserving raw-ID permutation, source clamp, reservoir clamp, producer omission, false installation, and matched-mass intervention each have a distinct frozen request identity
geometric, functional, and causal distance interfaces are callable
no control disposition or variation direction is assigned

conformance_matrix.name: forbidden_read_and_hidden_router_exclusion
requirements: export policy receives one route-local carrier value rather than a model or global state object
encounter adapter receives structure only
no runtime function receives both route values, participant labels, expected outcomes, or a route ranking
paired requests execute on independent clean branches and comparison occurs only in retained conformance analysis

conformance_matrix.name: mechanical_fixture_quarantine
requirements: conformance outputs use the dedicated p2-i3/conformance namespace
the quarantine guard rejects conformance paths, digests, fixture values, and observations from downstream calibration, registration-value, candidate, control-result, and scientific-result payloads
synthetic negative self-tests prove each prohibited consumer class is rejected

binding_receipt_requirements: exact RCAE HEAD and clean worktree
freeze, runtime module, harness, quarantine guard, and authority artifact SHA-256 digests
exact graph revision, clean graph worktree, graph source digests, and PyGRC import origin
interpreter, package versions, normalized command, attempt ceiling, and absent prior output
candidate, calibration, control-result, and scientific execution flags all false

forbidden_import_classes: conformance-derived comparator, margin, direction, or threshold
quarantine.allowed_later_reference: provenance-only reference that the accepted I03 conformance gate passed, without importing a path digest value observation or outcome into scientific inputs

classification_rules.all_cells_pass: implementation interfaces are operationally expressible at this exact source and fixture; no OP is supported or refuted scientifically
classification_rules.public_binding_failure: source or implementation blocker; never a negative L03 result
classification_rules.producer_interface_failure: RCAE implementation blocker or missing-surface evidence; never a negative L03 result
classification_rules.native_operation_failure: classify exact source/runtime mismatch and reopen the affected decision only if its accepted semantics cannot be represented
classification_rules.restoration_failure: block I03 exit and every later scientific activity
classification_rules.quarantine_failure: block conformance execution and later gates until mechanical rejection exists
classification_rules.unexpected_fixture_outcome: implementation-conformance failure; fixture values may not be tuned into a scientific success

evidence_responsive_extension_rule.trigger: conformance or later scientific results expose a stronger, cleaner, more native, more robust, or more discriminating structure worth testing
requirements: retain this accepted fixture, implementation result, and interpretation as historical evidence
assign the stronger structure a new realization, freeze, execution, and artifact identity
state whether it is an alternative, extension, naturalization attempt, or new discriminator
rerun every affected comparison and control rather than transferring the earlier result
do not retune this fixture or reinterpret its outcome as if the later structure had run
evidence_responsive_extension_rule.non_effect: the possibility of later stronger proof does not weaken, block, or inflate the bounded claim established by the present structure

review_boundary.next_required_boundary: commit this accepted freeze as the clean source anchor before harness construction and runtime execution
review_boundary.accepted_scope: construction of the exact runtime module, harness, and source-bound execution receipt followed by the single bounded conformance run
review_boundary.acceptance_does_not_open: I04 calibration preregistration, calibration, I06 registration, candidate execution, control outcomes, or any scientific claim

reopening_conditions: a required public call is not callable at the exact source revision
the B-R producer needs a forbidden input or must mutate native state directly
the blind encounter cannot be constructed without a field read or route selector
one of the three Q-013 contrast interfaces is not addressable without conflating its meaning
the Q-015 composite cannot fail closed or reproduce equal-input continuation
native refusal is not atomic relative to the already-scheduled request
mechanical quarantine cannot prevent conformance leakage into later scientific records
new graph evidence changes the admitted public or B-R contract boundary
